name: craftplanner
description: Domain-agnostic project management for makers — projects, cost tracking, time logging, events, and media.
author: Skund404

api_endpoints.description: List all projects with optional filters (status, search, tags)
api_endpoints.name: list_projects

api_endpoints.description: Get full project details including items, progress, and budget summary
api_endpoints.name: get_project

api_endpoints.description: Create a new project
api_endpoints.name: create_project

api_endpoints.description: Update an existing project
api_endpoints.name: update_project

api_endpoints.description: Delete a project and all associated items
api_endpoints.name: delete_project

api_endpoints.description: Get roll-up completion, budget, and time stats for a project
api_endpoints.name: get_project_progress

api_endpoints.description: Overview stats across all projects
api_endpoints.name: get_dashboard

api_endpoints.description: List project items with filters (project_id, type, status)
api_endpoints.name: list_items

api_endpoints.description: Add an item (buy or make) to a project
api_endpoints.name: create_item

api_endpoints.description: Update a project item
api_endpoints.name: update_item

api_endpoints.description: Remove an item from a project
api_endpoints.name: delete_item

api_endpoints.description: Log time spent on an item
api_endpoints.name: log_time

api_endpoints.description: List time log entries with filters (item_id, project_id, date range)
api_endpoints.name: list_time_logs

api_endpoints.description: List events with filters (project_id, date range)
api_endpoints.name: list_events

api_endpoints.description: Create an event (occasion where a project was used/shown)
api_endpoints.name: create_event

api_endpoints.description: Update an event
api_endpoints.name: update_event

api_endpoints.description: Delete an event
api_endpoints.name: delete_event

api_endpoints.description: Get cost breakdown for a project (budget vs actual)
api_endpoints.name: get_costs

api_endpoints.description: Add a cost entry to a project
api_endpoints.name: create_cost_entry

api_endpoints.description: Get items to buy for a project
api_endpoints.name: get_shopping_list

userdb_tables.name: craftplanner_projects
userdb_tables.description: Projects with budget, deadline, status, completion tracking

userdb_tables.name: craftplanner_items
userdb_tables.description: Per-project elements (buy vs make) with cost and time

userdb_tables.name: craftplanner_events
userdb_tables.description: Occasions where a project was used/shown

userdb_tables.name: craftplanner_cost_entries
userdb_tables.description: Budget allocations and actual spend per project
